_comment: Reusable CTA-style button template. Copy this object into items.json, then: (1) generate an icon with ./icon-to-base64.sh and paste it into image.base64, (2) set matchAppId to scope it to one app (or delete the line to always show), (3) pick a background hex color, (4) wire up whatever actions you need. background makes MTMR render a real filled/bordered pill instead of a bare floating icon (see CustomButtonTouchBarItem.swift ~line 107: setting backgroundColor forces isBordered=true and applies a solid fill) — that's what gives it the 'actual button' look instead of a flat icon.
